trigger.description: A persisted tripwire condition uses a condition kind the evaluator refuses to guess about.
setup_commands: ee diag tripwire --workspace . --tripwire-id tw_j6_unsupported_condition --preflight-run-id preflight_j6_unsupported --tripwire-type custom --condition 'unsupported_condition_kind(value)' --action warn --state armed --message 'J6 unsupported condition fixture' --created-at 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --json
